title: EBTA independent reproduction report
description: Rapport de reproduction independante soumis par un tiers avant VALIDATION_READY (G11). Source: SOP 12; DN-039; INV-016.
x_normative_source: Protocole/PAQUET D'EXECUTION EBTA.md section 4 (rapport de reproduction); SOP 12; DN-039, DN-041; INV-016

config_id.description: Reference to the preregistered configuration being reproduced.

original_manifest_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the original reproducibility_manifest.json that this report validates against.

reproduced_artefact_hashes.description: Map from artefact name to SHA-256 hash produced by the independent reproduction run.

environment.description: Full description of the reproducer's environment.

code_commit_hash.description: Git commit hash of the code used for reproduction.

commands.description: Ordered list of commands executed to reproduce the results.

tolerances.description: Optional: map from artefact name to maximum acceptable numeric delta for floating-point results.

reproducer_id.description: Identifier of the independent reproducer (person or system).

reproduction_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the reproduction run.
